---
title: "Eighteen Centuries of Beginnings of Church History."
---

## Eighteen Centuries of Beginnings of Church History.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1876
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John and Charles Mozley, 6, Paternoster Row, London.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
